title: agrostis glomerata
intro: Agrostis glomerata, also known as bent grass or common bent, is a perennial grass species native to the cooler regions of the Northern Hemisphere. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Agrostis glomerata include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Agrostis glomerata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
